title: Light the Fire among Late Crysanthemums

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Why'd you call me out here so early, Yukino? You have a way
different look on your face than yesterday.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Curren, I'm sorry for say'n such a silly thing yesterday!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
I'll do it! The highlight of the song. I'll dance to it right in the middle!
But I'm gonna need a lot more practice b'fore I'm ready...

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Please! Teach me how t'dance!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hehe! Sure. ♪ Now I know how to dance your part, so...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I'll teach you how to make it look super-duper cute!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Curren... I really 'preciate it! I'll pull out all the stops t'make this
dance perfect!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Oh? So she does have instincts. That's more like it.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Just have fun, Brian. That goes for this festival, the Fleetfoot Festival,
and the archery show with me.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: That's all I wish for you.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Hmph... This training's stolen enough of my time as it is. All it's doing
is making me hunger for the racecourse even more.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
(Complaining from inside my cage is getting boring too. A beast
would tear through it with their teeth and run wild.)

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Fine then... I'll have fun all right, in a way that suits me. Time to
unleash my instincts.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Brian. Here for a morning bath? It is, regrettably, the last day of
our trip, after all.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I just came to talk to you. I figured you'd come here to wake yourself
up, and here you are.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Haha. There are regular students on this trip with us, Brian. I'd
appreciate if you didn't reference my habit of oversleeping for the
sake of my appearance.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: But I digress. What did you want to discuss?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: The archery show.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
It's too boring to just follow the watered-down version of the event.
The audience must be bored of it by now too.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: If we're going to do this, why not do it the original way, "Emperor?"

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Oho...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
You said it, didn't you? The ritual used to be performed across the
whole sacred mountain.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
The archers would shoot countless targets, running and leaping
around the mountain in unforgiving natural conditions.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
There's more to it. The object was to reach the peak of the mountain
before the bonfire goes out, but the two archers also competed to
see who shoots the most targets.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
You proudly said to the director you'd make this year's Fleetfoot
Festival "a success like none other," remember?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
So you're saying that in terms of both novelty and entertainment, the
original format is better? Hehe. Indeed that is a well-reasoned
argument.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: It almost doesn't sound like you.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
You've shown me your power of persuasion, I require no more
convincing, Brian. I just want to know one thing.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Will you enjoy doing it that way?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Hah.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
What a stupid question. Join me for a real hunt, Emperor. That's what
our Goddesses would want, don't you think?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: I follow my instincts, and my instincts want real prey!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
So the beast is finally bearing its fangs. That's what I like to hear from
you, Brian.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
It goes without saying that I accept the proposal. We should proceed
with haste. Since we're here, shall we continue the discussion in the
sauna?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: What, you want to warm up with a test of endurance?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Haha! With you, Brian, that's not such a bad idea!
